Mazuri Tortoise Diet LS - Low Starch

Mazuri

Mazuri Tortoise Diet LS (Low Starch) is a highly palatable, complete diet formulated specifically for tortoises and other herbivorous reptiles. This low-starch formula helps maintain healthy digestive function and supports natural behaviors. Contains natural vitamin E and stabilized vitamin C.

Weight: 2 lbs (0.91 kg)

Ingredients

Soybean hulls, dehydrated alfalfa meal, ground soybean meal, wheat middlings, cane molasses, soybean oil, ground flaxseed, dicalcium phosphate, calcium carbonate, salt, L-lysine, dl-methionine...

Guaranteed Analysis

  • Crude Protein (min): 15.0%
  • Crude Fat (min): 3.0%
  • Crude Fiber (max): 18.0%
  • Moisture (max): 12.0%
  • Calcium (min): 0.85%
  • Phosphorus (min): 0.50%
  • Vitamin A (min): 15,000 IU/kg
  • Vitamin D (min): 1,400 IU/kg
  • Vitamin E (min): 110 IU/kg

Feeding Directions

Feed approximately 1-4% of body weight per day depending on species and life stage. Always provide fresh clean water. May be fed dry, soaked, or with greens/vegetables. Store in a cool, dry place.
